svg.title: Ricart-Agrawala concurrent cinema booking diagram
svg.desc: Cairo and Alex both request seat B4 at timestamp T=1. Tie-break: Alex wins (A less than C). Luxor stays RELEASED and replies to both immediately.
svg.text: ① Both multicast REQUEST <T=1, id> to all peers simultaneously
② Alex gets 2 replies (Luxor + Cairo) → enters CS first
Tie-break rule: "Alex" < "Cairo" alphabetically → Alex has priority → Cairo defers
Luxor (RELEASED) always replies immediately · No double-booking: one server in CS at a time ✓
